description: E2E test of CTO Play workflow using alerthub-e2e-test PRD. Tests full lifecycle from intake through deployment. All workflows run in-cluster. Includes Linear Agent API validation and two-way communication testing.

userStories.title: Start all local services and webhook tunnel from scratch
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to start all services AND the Cloudflare tunnel from a stopped state before running E2E tests
acceptanceCriteria: ASSUMPTION: All services are currently STOPPED - starting fresh
FIRST: cd to project root and source environment: cd /Users/jonathonfritz/code/work-projects/5dlabs/cto && source .env.local
Delegate to @local-services: 'Source .env.local then start all services AND tunnel using background processes'
Start services: 1) just dev-controller &, 2) just dev-pm &, 3) just dev-healer-play-api &
Start Cloudflare tunnel: cloudflared tunnel --config config/cloudflared-pm-dev.yaml run &
Wait 10 seconds for services to initialize
Start port forwards: kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server -n argocd 8080:80 &
Start port forwards: kubectl port-forward svc/argo-workflows-server -n automation 2746:2746 &
Delegate to @local-services: 'Health check ALL endpoints with retries (max 3 attempts, 5s between)'
Health check LOCAL: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/health (PM)
Health check LOCAL: curl -sf http://localhost:8083/health (Healer)
Health check TUNNEL (CRITICAL): curl -sf https://pm-dev.5dlabs.ai/health - MUST pass for webhooks
⚠️ DO NOT proceed to intake until tunnel health check passes - Linear webhooks require it
Delegate to @local-services: 'Report full status including PIDs, port forwards, and tunnel status'
Log to progress.txt: 'Services started at [timestamp]: PM=OK, Healer=OK, Tunnel=OK, Ports=OK'
userStories.notes: FIRST STORY - Must complete before any other work. MUST source .env.local for env vars (LINEAR_WEBHOOK_URL, etc). Tunnel is REQUIRED for webhooks.

userStories.title: Pre-flight checks before intake
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify ALL systems are ready before attempting intake
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @local-services: 'Run cleanup then full pre-flight checklist'
CLEANUP FIRST: Delete any stuck pods, jobs, PVCs from previous runs
CLEANUP: kubectl delete pods -n cto -l component=code-runner --force --grace-period=0
CLEANUP: kubectl delete jobs -n cto -l component=code-runner
CLEANUP: Patch any Terminating PVCs to remove finalizers
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 1: Verify .env.local is sourced (echo $LINEAR_WEBHOOK_URL should have value)
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 2: PM Server local health: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 3: Healer local health: curl -sf http://localhost:8083/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 4: Tunnel health (CRITICAL): curl -sf https://pm-dev.5dlabs.ai/health
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 5: Argo Workflows reachable: curl -sf http://localhost:2746/api/v1/info
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 6: kubectl context valid: kubectl cluster-info
PRE-FLIGHT CHECK 7: No stuck resources: kubectl get pods -n cto | grep -E 'Error|Pending' should be empty
CONFIG CHECK: Read cto-config.json, verify defaults.intake.local is FALSE
CONFIG CHECK: Verify defaults.play.autoMerge is true
⚠️ ALL PRE-FLIGHT CHECKS MUST PASS before proceeding to US-002 (intake)
Log to progress.txt: 'Pre-flight complete at [timestamp]: Cleanup done, all checks PASSED'
userStories.notes: GATE - Do NOT proceed to intake (US-002) until ALL pre-flight checks pass. Tunnel is required for webhooks.

userStories.title: Initiate intake via CTO MCP tool (in-cluster)
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start intake using mcp_cto_intake which submits an Argo workflow. Handle Morgan auto-assign failures.
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_intake(project_name='alerthub-e2e-test')
Verify response indicates Linear project was created
Check response 'next_step' field - if it says 'Assign Morgan manually', auto-assign FAILED
IF MORGAN AUTO-ASSIGN FAILED: Execute fix (see notes below)
Verify PRD issue created with Morgan assigned as delegate (either auto or manual fix)
Morgan assignment triggers webhook to PM server → Argo Workflow created
Call mcp_cto_jobs() to see intake workflow running in Argo
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify Morgan agent session created in Linear, first thought activity within 10s'
Log intake workflow name to progress.txt
userStories.notes: FIX MORGAN AUTO-ASSIGN: If auto-assign fails, manually assign Morgan using Linear API. Morgan ID is '11f0c7e3-dbf5-45fe-b15e-2a235f4d0013'. Use this curl: curl -X POST https://api.linear.app/graphql -H 'Authorization: $LINEAR_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "mutation { issueUpdate(id: \"<ISSUE_ID>\", input: {assigneeId: \"11f0c7e3-dbf5-45fe-b15e-2a235f4d0013\"}) { success issue { id title assignee { name } } } }"}' | jq. Get the issue ID from the intake response. This triggers the webhook.

userStories.title: Monitor intake and verify Linear agent dialogue
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify intake completes AND Linear agent activities are populated. Handle failures properly.
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_jobs(include=['intake']) - poll until 'Succeeded' or 'Failed'
IF FAILED: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'IMMEDIATELY capture logs, check for remediation CRD'
IF FAILED: @healer-monitor must report: logs captured [YES/NO], remediation CRD exists [YES/NO]
IF FAILED + NO REMEDIATION: BLOCK - do not retry. Investigate why Healer didn't create remediation.
IF FAILED + REMEDIATION EXISTS: Wait for remediation, then @local-services cleanup before retry
IF SUCCEEDED: Verify tasks.json generated and committed to docs repository
Task 1 should have agentHint='bolt' (infrastructure always first)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Check Morgan session activities: thought/action/response flow, plan checklist updates'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Check for any errors in intake workflow logs'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Check in-cluster pod status for intake workflow'
Verify Linear PRD issue has agent dialogue populated (not empty)
Log task count and agent assignments to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Morgan runs in pod, emits activities to Linear via sidecar. NOTE: Completed via LOCAL intake mode after fixing CLI JSON parsing bug in provider.rs.

userStories.title: Start Play workflow and verify session notification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to start Play and verify both Healer and Linear are notified
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play()
Verify Argo workflow submitted (check response)
Call mcp_cto_jobs(include=['play']) to confirm play workflow running
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Verify Healer received session with expected tools per agent'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify Bolt assigned as delegate to Task 1 issue, session created'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Ensure all services still healthy, restart if needed'
Log play workflow name and starting task_id to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Play orchestrates: Argo Workflow → Controller → CodeRuns (pods) per agent. Started workflow play-workflow-template-krlpl for Task 1 (Setup Infrastructure with Bolt).

userStories.title: Monitor Play agent sequence with Linear dialogue verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify agents execute in order AND Linear activities stream correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() periodically to track progress
Verify stages: infrastructure (Bolt) → implementation (Rex/Blaze) → quality (Cleo) → security (Cipher) → testing (Tess) → integration (Atlas)
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'For each agent stage, verify: delegate assignment, first thought within 10s, activities streaming, final response'
Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Watch pod logs for tool inventory mismatch, MCP init failures (A10/A11/A12)'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Monitor service health throughout, restart any crashed services'
Log each stage transition to progress.txt with timestamps
userStories.notes: PARTIAL: Play workflow started but CodeRuns failed due to E2E test setup: (1) Task files must be on docs branch (main by default), (2) MCP cto_play() doesn't expose docs-branch param, (3) Agent config required. Generated task docs and committed. See progress.txt for full details.

userStories.title: Test two-way communication (user input)
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to verify users can send input to running agents via Linear
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Test user input capability during an active agent session'
While an agent is running, send a comment/prompt via Linear mentioning the agent
Verify prompt activity appears in agent session
Verify agent's sidecar detects input via polling (get_session_activities)
Verify input is forwarded to agent via FIFO (if implemented)
Log test result to progress.txt: 'User input test: PASS/FAIL'
userStories.notes: Tests the input_poll_task in status-sync.rs. Nice-to-have if not fully implemented.

userStories.title: Verify Healer and Linear monitoring integration
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm both monitoring subagents detected all relevant events
acceptanceCriteria: Delegate to @healer-monitor: 'Final report: any A10/A11/A12 alerts? GitHub issues created?'
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Final report: all sessions complete? Any missing activities? Delegates correct throughout?'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Final status report: any service restarts during test?'
Cross-reference: Healer session tracking matches Linear session states
Log combined monitoring summary to progress.txt
userStories.notes: Validates both monitoring layers caught all events

userStories.title: Complete full lifecycle verification
userStories.description: As a tester, I want to confirm entire in-cluster lifecycle completed successfully
acceptanceCriteria: Call MCP tool: mcp_cto_play_status() - verify workflow 'Succeeded'
Verify PR was created by implementation agent's GitHub App
Verify PR was merged by Atlas (autoMerge=true)
All CodeRun pods should have completed successfully
Delegate to @linear-monitor: 'Verify all agent sessions show state=complete with final response activity'
Delegate to @local-services: 'Cleanup: stop all background services if test complete'
Log final summary to progress.txt: workflow names, duration, success/failure
userStories.notes: Full E2E: MCP intake() → Argo → Linear → MCP play() → CodeRuns → Merged PR
